---
agent: agent
description: Unified HTML style prompt for creating HTML files based on Markdown content.
---

以下のHTMLスタイルを基準化して、統一化された指示を `.github\instructions\html.instructions.md` に記述して。

- `csharp\build2026-csharp-updates.html`
- `microsoft-foundry\microsoft-foundry-build-2026-features.html`
- `copilot-token\build2026-github-copilot-token-optimization-sessions.html`
